title: Non-resident Stamp Duty Land Tax research
body: "The objectives of the research were:     to explore the impact that a new Stamp Duty Land Tax (SDLT) surcharge would have on non-UK residents.     to identify the types and values of the properties that non-UK residents purchase.     The research was conducted with 289 non-UK resident purchasers, taking place between October 2020 and January 2021.  "

taxons.title: Stamp duty and other tax on property
